concept.faction_anchor: Seraphim aesthetic: sleek, polished, chrome; smooth continuous curved surfaces with almost no jagged angles; a single thin glowing amber light-channel tracing the form; lit-from-within polished marble warmth
concept.unit_role_phrase: the full torso/body of a towering hovering commander spire-mech, elegant vertical silhouette, crown-like upper structure, no legs (hovers)
concept.variation_adjectives: seraphic, angelic, luminous white-and-chrome, swept wing-blade shoulders, halo motif
concept.negative_terms: no text, no base plate, no weapons, no humanoid face, no jagged spikes, no dark gothic elements

engine.slot_anchor_offset: TUNE: Cosmetics.SLOT_ANCHORS torso — placeholder offsets, expect adjustment at G5

notes: PILOT ASSET. Torso replaces the Commander base body (hides the Needle hifi/procedural rig visual). Verify against the existing architect_commander_hifi.glb scale before export. Optional follow-up in same variation: seraphic_fin.glb in slot 'extra' (Fins). Commander budget raised vs standard part budget (hero unit). Colors stay neutral in-texture — Seraphic preset colors come from the Cosmetics color channels (albedo/emission-color tint), so author textures in near-white/chrome.
